title: TopSkeletonFirst
rule: If a governance need appears, extend the top-level skeleton before creating subordinate governance artifacts.

title: NoInterimLowerSkeleton
rule: Do not create replace-soon lightweight governance scaffolds beneath the intended top-level skeleton.

title: MSWNativeOnly
rule: MapleWorld must remain within MapleStory Worlds-native runtime constraints and must not introduce an external backend.

title: ServerAuthority
rule: Gameplay mutation, reward mutation, and progression mutation must remain server-authoritative.

title: BottleneckFirst
rule: Autonomous work should optimize the current highest-cost player-experience bottleneck before broad feature expansion.

title: PreservePlayerFeel
rule: Structural or metric improvements must be rejected if they degrade first-session feel, route variance, or canon locks.

title: DeterministicOfflineEvaluation
rule: Simulation, scoring, merge, mutation, and progress updates must be deterministic and repository-local.

title: TopLevelPatchAuthority
rule: Governance-changing patches must first update the top-level skeleton documents and audits before relying on lower-level references.
